/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/qt_client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/app/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/network/tcp_client_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/media/stream_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/media/record_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/database/database_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/repository/app_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_client.dir/qt_client_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o qt_client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6MultimediaWidgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
